title: Nexus Malls is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Nexus Malls is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
